title: Offices outside of New Zealand (Visa Application Centres) :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Offices outside of New Zealand (Visa Application Centres)
Outside New Zealand we use Visa Application Centres (VACs) to receive applications for some visas.
Appointments at a VAC are required. To book an appointment at your nearest VAC visit the VFS Global website.
For individuals — VFS Global
- Australia Visa Application Centre — VFS Global New Zealand Visa Application Centre Level 6 88 Pitt Street Sydney, NSW 2000 Australia
Australia Visa Application Centre — VFS Global
New Zealand Visa Application Centre Level 6 88 Pitt Street Sydney, NSW 2000 Australia
